analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Swiss designer loves Chinese tea culture and designs innovative tea-related products blending Chinese culture with international elements. This is a cultural promotion piece. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – not mentioned or implied. CH2 (China as benevolent power) – no reference to China's international policy, cooperation, or global governance; it's an individual designer’s cultural endeavor, so not applicable. CH3 (epic history) – no historical adversity or CCP-linked resilience discussed. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – no political system or governance values mentioned. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – no claim about government-driven successes. CH6 (China interesting in culture/nature/heritage) – yes; it highlights Chinese tea culture as appealing and influential, promoting cultural interest. Conclusion: Only CH6 is supported.
